# DjangoAPI Guard Documentation - LLMs.txt
# For LLM Crawlers and AI Assistants
# Documentation Site: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard

## Overview
DjangoAPI Guard is a comprehensive security middleware for Django applications, providing enterprise-grade protection with minimal configuration. Powered by guard-core, the framework-agnostic security engine. This documentation site provides complete technical guides, API references, tutorials, and examples.

## Documentation Structure

### Getting Started
- **Home**: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/
- **Installation**: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/installation/
- **First Steps**: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/first-steps/

### Core Features Documentation

#### IP Management
- **IP Banning**: Automatic and manual IP banning with threshold-based blocking
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/ip-management/banning/
- **Geolocation**: Country-based access control using IP geolocation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/ip-management/geolocation/
- **Cloud Providers**: Block requests from AWS, GCP, Azure IP ranges
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/ip-management/cloud-providers/
- **Rate Limiting**: Multiple strategies (fixed window, sliding window, token bucket)
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/ip-management/rate-limiter/

#### Security Decorators
- **Overview**: Route-level security with Python decorators
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/overview/
- **Access Control**: IP whitelisting, blacklisting, country restrictions
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/access-control/
- **Authentication**: Bearer, Basic, API Key header validation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/authentication/
- **Rate Limiting Decorators**: Per-route rate limits
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/rate-limiting/
- **Behavioral Analysis**: Usage monitoring, return value monitoring
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/behavioral/
- **Content Filtering**: Request/response content validation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/content-filtering/
- **Advanced Decorators**: Combined security features
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/advanced/

#### Security Features
- **Penetration Detection**: SQL injection, XSS, command injection detection
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/penetration-detection/
- **Detection Engine**: Advanced pattern matching and threat detection
  - Overview: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/detection-engine/overview/
  - Architecture: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/detection-engine/architecture/
  - Components: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/detection-engine/components/
  - Configuration: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/detection-engine/configuration/
  - Performance: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/detection-engine/performance-tuning/
- **Proxy Security**: Trusted proxy handling, X-Forwarded-For validation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/proxy-security/
- **Custom Patterns**: Define custom attack patterns
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/custom-patterns/
- **Security Monitoring**: Event tracking and analytics
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/monitoring/

#### Configuration
- **Security Config**: Complete configuration reference
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/configuration/security-config/
- **CORS**: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing setup
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/configuration/cors/
- **Logging**: Security event logging configuration
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/configuration/logging/

#### Redis Integration
- **Distributed State**: Redis for multi-instance deployments
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/redis-integration/caching/

#### Advanced Topics
- **Advanced Customizations**: Custom request checks, response modifiers
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/advanced-customizations/
- **Example Application**: Complete working example
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/tutorial/examples/example-app/

### API Reference

Complete API documentation for all classes and functions:

- **Overview**: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/overview/
- **DjangoAPIGuard**: Main middleware class
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/security-middleware/
- **Core Architecture**: Internal architecture and design
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/core-architecture/
- **SecurityDecorators**: All decorator functions
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/decorators/
- **BehaviorManager**: Behavioral analysis manager
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/behavior-manager/
- **RedisManager**: Redis state management
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/redis-manager/
- **IPBanManager**: IP banning logic
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/ipban-manager/
- **IPInfoManager**: IP geolocation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/ipinfo-manager/
- **RateLimitManager**: Rate limiting algorithms
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/ratelimit-manager/
- **SusPatternsManager**: Suspicious pattern detection
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/sus-patterns/
- **CloudManager**: Cloud provider IP management
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/cloud-manager/
- **SecurityHeadersManager**: HTTP security headers
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/security-headers/
- **Utilities**: Helper functions and utilities
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/api/utilities/

### Release Notes
- **Changelog**: All version history and updates
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/latest/release-notes/

## Key Features Explained

### Attack Detection Patterns
- SQL Injection (UNION, SELECT, DROP, etc.)
- Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via script tags and event handlers
- Command Injection (shell commands, pipe operators)
- Path Traversal (../, directory escaping)
- LDAP Injection
- XML/XXE Injection
- Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
- NoSQL Injection

### Security Headers Managed
- Content-Security-Policy (CSP)
- Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS)
- X-Frame-Options (Clickjacking protection)
- X-Content-Type-Options (MIME sniffing)
- X-XSS-Protection
- Referrer-Policy
- Permissions-Policy
- Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy (COEP)
- Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy (COOP)
- Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy (CORP)

## Installation

```bash
pip install djapi-guard
```

## Quick Start Example

```python
# settings.py
from djangoapi_guard import SecurityConfig

GUARD_SECURITY_CONFIG = SecurityConfig(
    whitelist=["192.168.1.1"],
    blacklist=["10.0.0.1"],
    rate_limit=100,
    auto_ban_threshold=5,
    block_cloud_providers={"AWS", "GCP", "AZURE"},
)

MIDDLEWARE = [
    "djangoapi_guard.middleware.DjangoAPIGuard",
    # ... other middleware
]
```

## Technology Stack

- **Python**: 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13, 3.14
- **Django**: WSGI web framework
- **guard-core**: Framework-agnostic security engine
- **Pydantic**: Data validation
- **Redis**: Optional distributed state (redis-py)
- **MaxMindDB**: IP geolocation data

## Version Information
This documentation covers all versions of DjangoAPI Guard. Use the version selector to view docs for specific versions. Latest stable version is always recommended for production use.

Default version: latest (stable)
Provider: Mike (MkDocs versioning)
Versions JSON: https://rennf93.github.io/djapi-guard/versions.json
